user_prompt: Write a reply to a user whose API integration broke after our last release. Include clear next steps.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Technical - API Integration

Draft response:
Hi there,

I am so sorry to hear that your API integration broke following our latest release. I know how disruptive downtime can be to your workflow and your team, and I want to help get this sorted out as quickly as possible. 

Our recent update did include a few changes to our API endpoints and payload structures, which might be causing the issue you're experiencing. 

To help me pinpoint exactly what's going wrong, could you please provide a few quick details?
1. Which specific API endpoint(s) are failing?
2. Could you share the exact error messages or status codes you are receiving?
3. A snippet of the request payload you are sending (please make sure to redact any sensitive API keys or passwords).

In the meantime, you can also review our recent API changelog here: [Link to API Changelog] to see if any of the documented breaking changes apply to your setup.

Once you send over those details, I will investigate immediately and, if necessary, escalate this directly to our engineering team to get you back up and running. 

Best,
Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a response drafting task within its support role and provided a high-quality, empathetic draft with clear next steps.
